items.title: England learning on the job in ODIs - Root
items.summary: England batter Joe Root explains the difficulties for young batters in 50-over cricket because of a lack of exposure to the format.
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.

items.title: Kylian Mbappé Leaves World Cup With Legacy Intact, But Nothing To Show For It
items.summary: Kylian Mbappé built on his World Cup legacy at this year's tournament, but without the hardware to match, does it still matter?
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: New York issues air quality alert days before World Cup final
items.summary: Officials in New York and New Jersey issue an air quality health alert because of wildfire smoke just days before the World Cup final.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.
